commands.review_summary:
The PR adds shared Crabbox skill guidance for installing a missing or stale sibling Crabbox CLI and using a local-container fallback for fresh-PR smoke validation.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a skill documentation PR rather than a reported runtime bug. The relevant check is whether the proposed operational commands are accurate and fit shared-skill policy.
commands.review_followup: This PR needs contributor-provided real behavior proof before merge; automation cannot supply proof for the contributor's setup.

target.title: docs: teach crabbox skill install fallback
target.body:
Summary
- Teach the shared Crabbox skill to install/build the sibling `../crabbox/bin/crabbox` CLI when it is missing or stale.
- Add a fresh-PR/local-container fallback note covering the practical setup issues from the OpenClaw PR smoke run: delegated Testbox `--fresh-pr` limits, provider labeling, `corepack enable` symlink failures, pnpm `ERR_PNPM_EXDEV`, missing Blacksmith CLI, and broker/AWS auth checks.
- Companion OpenClaw repo-local skill PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/86985

Verification
- `git diff --check`
- `scripts/validate-skills`
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
